mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_message (room_id, user_id, content) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{userId}, #{content})
INSERT INTO message_read_status (message_id, user_id, room_id, is_read) VALUES (#{messageId}, #{userId}, #{roomId}, #{isRead})
INSERT INTO chat_room (is_group_chat, name, post_id) VALUES (#{isGroupChat}, #{name}, #{postId})
mapper.select: SELECT room_id, name FROM chat_room WHERE is_group_chat = 1

SELECT m.content AS message, u.nickname AS sender_name, u.login_id AS sender_id
FROM chat_message m INNER JOIN users u ON m.user_id = u.user_id WHERE m.room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY m.created_at ASC

SELECT r.room_id, r.name AS room_name, r.is_group_chat
FROM chat_participant p INNER JOIN chat_room r ON p.room_id = r.room_id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT #{roomId} AS room_id, user_id FROM post_participants WHERE post_id = #{postId}
